title: What is the most powerful Eva
display_title: What is the most powerful Eva
wikitext:
[]: What is the most powerful Eva?             Quote Post by terminus » Tue May 27, 2008 5:13 pm Well in all animes there's the inevitable question "who's the most powerful?" ....so, who is the most powerful Eva? personally I think it's Eva-05 or Eva-01

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Tue May 27, 2008 5:20 pm Had Unit 04 been completed, and operated succesfully under Piloted power, it would've been the most powerful by a long shot. It would have had a virtually inexhaustible power supply.And the pilots own skill and ability makes up for any pain shortcomings. The MPEva's are mechanically the most combat effective, with the ability to fly, regenerate, and an unlimited combat endurance. But, their Dummy plug systems are just that... Dummy's... they're quickly porved to be no match for a human Pilot in close combat. Unit 02 is probably more powerful in general use than Unit 01... given that it's a later model, and it probably doesn't have/need all the heavy binders fitted to Unit 01. It's the first Real production model. For day to day stuff, it is better. But, it's hard to argue with the with of a berserker Unit 01... And an explosion the size of Japan when she gets right pissed off. Even if it's about as reliable as my QC abilities...

[]:             Quote Post by terminus » Tue May 27, 2008 5:27 pm Is it possible to put a human pilot in Eva-05? or "only" Dummy Plugs? that would be pretty awesome, the special abilities of the mass productions combined with human soul and intelligence.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Tue May 27, 2008 5:30 pm Hmmmm . . . what would happen if you put a kid in an MP eva?

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Tue May 27, 2008 5:33 pm Id go with eva unit 01 due to it being a berserker, but due to Asukas performance in EOE i think its a tie.

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Tue May 27, 2008 5:38 pm Iron Rooster wrote: Hmmmm . . . what would happen if you put a kid in an MP eva?

[]:             Quote Post by terminus » Tue May 27, 2008 5:39 pm mrpanda wrote: Id go with eva unit 01 due to it being a berserker, but due to Asukas performance in EOE i think its a tie.

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Tue May 27, 2008 5:44 pm terminus wrote: mrpanda wrote: Id go with eva unit 01 due to it being a berserker, but due to Asukas performance in EOE i think its a tie.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Tue May 27, 2008 5:53 pm shogouki. durr.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Tue May 27, 2008 5:53 pm It's the kill the brain idea. Crude but effective. Bastards can't fight without a brain. And Unit 01 is the most powerful. It's got Yui power!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by terminus » Tue May 27, 2008 6:03 pm Dartz wrote: terminus wrote: mrpanda wrote: Id go with eva unit 01 due to it being a berserker, but due to Asukas performance in EOE i think its a tie.

[]:             Quote Post by zimlord » Tue May 27, 2008 6:06 pm Lovecraft Unit 01

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Tue May 27, 2008 6:30 pm Unit-Harrison Ford

[]:             Quote Post by terminus » Tue May 27, 2008 7:53 pm chee wrote: Unit-Harrison Ford

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue May 27, 2008 8:20 pm slothen wrote: shogouki. durr.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Tue May 27, 2008 8:20 pm Gurren Lag...

[]:             Quote Post by terminus » Tue May 27, 2008 8:25 pm Sachi_13 wrote: slothen wrote: shogouki. durr.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue May 27, 2008 8:38 pm Gurren---er, Eva-01. WHO THE HELL DO YOU THINK SHE IS?!

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue May 27, 2008 11:18 pm It's defintiely 01, 01 has owned opponents that easily defeated 00 and 02. Even when Shinji wasn't piloting and the dummy was in control 01's raw power overwhelmed Bardial who had been too much for 00 and 02 to handle.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Tue May 27, 2008 11:24 pm I really wish I saw Bardiel take out Unit 02. I still think it's unbelievable that it took Asuka out so easily, even if it did catch her off guard.
